title: Commission members; compensation prohibited; expenses
doc_html:
§44.  Commission members; compensation prohibited; expenses

Members of the commission shall not receive compensation for their services, but shall be paid actual expenses necessarily incurred in the performance of their duties as members of the commission.

Acts 1995, No. 1077, §1.
